expo.name: Wayfarer
expo.description: Offline, private travel translator & vision assistant powered by on-device QVAC AI.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Wayfarer uses the camera to scan signs, menus and documents so it can read and translate them entirely on your device.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Wayfarer reads photos you choose so it can extract and translate text entirely on your device.

plugins.photosPermission: Wayfarer reads photos you choose so it can extract and translate text entirely on your device.
plugins.cameraPermission: Wayfarer uses the camera to scan signs, menus and documents so it can read and translate them entirely on your device.
